visual: Balances on the left leg and extends the right leg forward with the heel leading, arms opening outward in a cross-hands-to-wide-arms motion.
motion_description: The practitioner balances steadily on a bent left leg, lifting the right knee high towards the chest while crossing the forearms in front of the face. In a slow, continuous flow, the right leg extends straight forward, pushing outward with the heel. Simultaneously, the crossed arms separate and sweep horizontally in opposite directions to shoulder height, palms facing outward, with the torso remaining upright and stable. After a deliberate pause at full extension, the right knee retracts while the arms lower and gather forward.
